pages.text:
MNISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS AND EXTERNAL TRADE

REPUBLIC OF THE FIJI ISLANDS

INSTURMENTS OF ACCESSION

WHEREAS the Convention relating to International Exhibitions was done at Paris on 22 November 1928:

WHEREAS the Convention was amended and supplemented by the Protocols of 10 May 1948, 16 November 1966, 30 November 1972, the Amendments of 24

June 1982 and 31 May 1988:

AND WEREAS Article 3 of the 1972 Protocol provides to the effect that the

Protocol shall remain open for accession by the Government Parties to the 1928

Convention after 29 November 1973:

NOW THEREFORE, the Government of the Republic of the Fiji Islands hereby accedes to the 1928 Convention/

and the 1972

Protocol, including the

Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988, and undertakes faithfully to fulfill and carry out all the provisions therein contained.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I Ratu Epeli Nailatikau, Minister for Foreign Affairs and External Trade of the Republic of the Fiji Islands have signed the present

Instrument of Accession and caused the Seal of the Minister of Foreign Affairs and External Trade of the Republic of the Fiji Islands be hereto affixed.

Done at

Sura, FITI

- On the 3,8t day of October in the

year Two Thousand and Seven.

Galah

Ratu Epeli Nailatikau

Minister for Foreian Affairs and External Trade

MNISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS AND EXTERNAL TRADE

REPUBLIC OF THE FIJI ISLANDS

INSTURMENTS OF ACCESSION

WHEREAS the Convention relating to International Exhibitions was done at Paris on 22 November 1928;

WHEREAS the Convention was amended and supplemented by the Protocols of 10 May 1948, 16 November 1966, 30 November 1972, the Amendments of 24

June 1982 and 31 May 1988:

AND WEREAS Article 3 of the 1972 Protocol provides to the effect that the

Protocol shall remain open for accession by the Government Parties to the 1928

Convention after 29 November 1973:

NOW THEREFORE, the Government of the Republic of the Fiji Islands hereby accedes to the 1928

Convention and the 1972 Protocol, including the

Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988, and undertakes faithfully to fulfill and carry out all the provisions therein contained.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I Ratu Epeli Nailatikau, Minister for Foreign Affairs and External Trade of the Republic of the Fiji Islands have signed the present instrument of Accession and caused the Seal of the Minister of Foreign Affairs and External Trade of the Republic of the Fiji Islands be hereto affixed.

Dono at Sura, FIT on the 31".

day or Octaber in the

year Two Thousand and Seven.

Lette

Ratu Epeli Nailatikau

Minister for Foreign Affairs and External Trade
